description_long: This office building features a modern, rectilinear design with a combination of glass and concrete facades. The structure is composed of two main wings connected by a central elevated corridor, with large glass atriums on the roof allowing natural light into the interior. The front facade is dominated by wide glass panels and a prominent recessed entryway, while the rear and sides reveal additional glass-covered walkways and terraces. The roof includes multiple skylights with geometric framing, and the building sits on a dark, flat base that suggests a plaza or entry forecourt. The exterior is accented with horizontal bands and some wood-textured panels, adding warmth to the otherwise sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall impression is of a high-end, corporate office building designed for both functionality and visual impact.
description: A modern office building with glass atriums, concrete and glass facades, and a central elevated corridor connecting two main wings. The design features skylights, wide glass panels, and a prominent recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, recessed entry, and wood-accented panels at the base.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the large glass atrium roof and the extended terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central elevated corridor, multiple skylights, and open terrace spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the geometric glass roof structure and secondary entry points.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of large rectangular windows, evenly spaced with some sections featuring continuous glass curtain walls and skylights.
